name: Protegrity
description: Data protection platform offering tokenization, encryption, and masking for PCI and sensitive payment data.

seo.title: Protegrity — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: Protegrity: Data protection platform offering tokenization, encryption, and masking for PCI and sensitive payment data.

when_to_use: Tokenizing PCI payment data for PCI DSS compliance
Masking sensitive fields in data pipelines for privacy compliance
Encrypting payment data for LLM processing without exposure

pros: Covers PCI, PII, and broader data protection
cons: Heavy enterprise software, not a payments product
review.verdict: Credible choice for large regulated enterprises, but a data-protection platform, not a payments orchestrator.
review.best_for: Banks, insurers, and large enterprises needing unified tokenization across payments and sensitive data.
review.not_for: Startups and mid-market merchants who just need PCI scope reduction for card data.
